description: CompositionWhite full sleeve shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has green checks with a hint of black, fabric lining inside the collar, a chest pocket on the left, full length buttoned placket and a mildly curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm on gentle cycleUse only non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry low on gentle cycleIron if desiredThis long sleeve shirt from timberland features a rustic plaid pattern in 100% cotton that looks great with jeans, khakis and timberland boots for an outdoor-inspired look that won't ever go out of style. One chest pocket, a locker loop inside the collar and a full-button center placket add to the traditional style of this shirt. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
